hooks.command: node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||j.tool_response?.filePath||"";if(/src[\\/]services[\\/]|prisma[\\/]/.test(f)){const{execSync}=require("child_process");try{execSync("npx tsc --noEmit",{encoding:"utf8",timeout:30000});process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Type check passed."}}))}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Type check errors:\n"+e.stdout}}))}}})'

node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||"";if(/[\\/]\.env/.test(f)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:"block",reason:"Blocked: do not edit .env files directly. Manage environment variables through your deployment platform or manually outside Claude Code."}))}})'
